data.content: Implementation lives on branch worktree-foolery-54e9-live-plan-validation (commit 67a98229). Structural assertions are in scripts/test-plans-live.mjs: verifyPlanShape() checks artifact.type === 'execution_plan', artifact.id, plan.repoPath, plan.beatIds (must include each requested beat), plan.waves[].waveIndex, plan.waves[].steps[].stepIndex, plan.waves[].steps[].beatIds, progress.waves, progress.nextStep, and a non-empty skillPrompt. checkBeatIdsCover() and checkWaves() emit specific issue.kind values (requested_beat_dropped, wave_missing_index, step_missing_beat_ids, etc.) under the structural_drift category. Persistence is independently verified by spawning kno -C <repo> show <planId> --json and asserting type === 'execution_plan' and the execution_plan payload exists, with separate persistence_missing, persistence_taxonomy_drift, and persistence_payload_missing categories.
